name: Setting row
structurePatterns: row is a space-between flex with a main block (title + description) on the left and a control slot on the right

control is one of three variants — A: .ds-settingrow__select (dropdown trigger), B: .ds-settingrow__btn (action button, optional .ds-settingrow__btn--danger for destructive), C: .ds-settingrow__select + .ds-settingrow__iconbtn pair (select with adjacent icon-button)
stack multiple rows inside .ds-settingrow__panel; adjacent rows are separated by a top border on the second+ row
group several panels with a .ds-settingrow__group wrapping a .ds-settingrow__grouplabel header (e.g. 基础设置 / 偏好设置 / 数据管理) followed by a .ds-settingrow__panel
usageHints: use the select control for choosing among preset options (theme, language, default-open mode)
use the button control for triggering actions or opening secondary configuration (去设置 / 导入)
use .ds-settingrow__btn--danger for destructive actions (清除 / Clear)
use the select-with-icon pair when the row has both a primary preset choice and a secondary detailed-config entry (e.g. 快捷键设置 + gear icon)
group related rows in a panel; group multiple panels under a labeled .ds-settingrow__group section
doNotInvent: switch / toggle controls (use .ds-form-switch from forms component if needed)
